# Heavy Storms (1.21.1-NeoForge and 1.20.1-Forge)

Heavy Storms amplifies thunderstorms and introduces a Forge Energy compatible Lightning Capacitor block for Minecraft 1.21.1 using NeoForge, and 1.20.1 using Forge.

## Features

- Spawns additional lightning strikes around players during thunderstorms with configurable
  frequency and radius.
- Adds the Lightning Capacitor block that gains FE from real lightning strikes. 
  **(no lightin rod required)**
- Exposes Forge Energy via the standard Forge capability system so automation mods (e.g.,                          
  Mekanism universal cables or any other FE power managment system) can interact with the
  capacitor.
